mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_star_wallets(user_id) VALUES(#{userId}) ON CONFLICT (user_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.update: UPDATE user_star_wallets SET balance = balance + #{amount}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE user_star_wallets SET free_trip_quota_used = free_trip_quota_used + 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND free_trip_quota_used < 2
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM star_transactions WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM star_transactions WHERE reference_key = #{referenceKey}
SELECT * FROM trip_creation_entitlements WHERE user_id=#{userId} AND consumed_at IS NULL AND expires_at > #{now} ORDER BY expires_at ASC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE trip_creation_entitlements SET consumed_at=#{now} WHERE id=#{id} AND consumed_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT t.id AS trip_id, t.owner_id FROM trips t LEFT JOIN activities a ON a.trip_id = t.id LEFT JOIN trip_photos tp ON tp.trip_id = t.id WHERE t.end_date < CURRENT_DATE AND t.visibility = 'PUBLIC' AND t.is_deleted = FALSE GROUP BY t.id, t.owner_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) >= 5 AND COUNT(DISTINCT tp.id) >= 5
